case_title: WESSNE GEBRMEDHIN VS. SANDS PATH ACADEMY

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-14-2012 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GEBRMEDHIN, WESSNE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SANDS PATH ACADEMY (CYNTHIA SCOTT ) $2,250.00 PRINCIPAL, $78.05 INTEREST, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,388.05 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
